_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national cron (Adam Johns)
_meta.note: Federal House batch CA-06..CA-09 — Bera (D, Sacramento suburbs physician), Matsui (D, Sacramento city, since 2005), Garamendi (D, Solano/SacCo/Contra Costa, since 2009, HASC), Harder (D, Stockton/San Joaquin, since 2019, House Ag). NOTE: mike-thompson (CA-04 D) was the 5th candidate in priority order but was SKIPPED this batch because the slug 'mike-thompson' collides with MS State Senator + KS State Senator records — engine resolves last-wins which would mis-apply to the wrong record. Flagged for a slug-disambiguation pass before refinement. HETERODOX-D STANDOUT: Garamendi has confirmed $0 AIPAC (own statement: 'I've taken $0 from AIPAC' on X, June 2026), introduced his own Iran War Powers Resolution, voted against offensive-weapons funding for Israel, cosponsored Ceasefire Compliance Act, AND is lead House Dem on Pentagon-waste reform (Nunn-McCurdy Reform Act with Gimenez R; Streamline Pentagon Budgeting Act with Jayapal D + McClintock R; Stop Price Gouging the Military Act with Sen Warren) — qualifies a sweep on foreign_policy_restraint q0/q1/q2/q3 PLUS industry_capture q4. HETERODOX-D CATCHES (others): Harder YES on Laken Riley (Jan 2025) — one of only 46 House D crossovers (border_immigration q1/q2 TRUE); all four voted YES on Iran WPR (June 2026). Matsui voted NO on the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act (which means she did NOT oppose CBDC; orthodox D, FALSE on q0). AIPAC numbers per TrackAIPAC: Bera $269K (FALSE), Matsui labeled AIPAC-backed (FALSE), Harder $234K (FALSE), Garamendi $0 (TRUE). All four hostile on life/marriage/2A (HARD FALSE patterns from RFMA, Equality Act, WHPA, Bipartisan Background Checks; no heterodox crossovers found).

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing archetype_party_default. Scored from congress.gov roll calls + Heritage Action scorecard (9%) + Reproductive Freedom for All (100%) + Planned Parenthood Champions for Women's Health Award 2015 + TrackAIPAC ($269,170 from AIPAC/CAJD/JAC/JSTREET) + NRA-PVF F + GOA 7%. Standard Sacramento-suburb pro-choice/pro-LGBTQ/pro-gun-control Democrat with no heterodox catches on the conservative-restraint axis (AUMF repeal NOT cosponsored, Israel aid YES). HASC member but interventionist track record (former Chair Indo-Pacific subcommittee). Physician — pro-FDA-COVID-mandate posture (criticized Trump's narrowing of vaccine eligibility). Unitarian Universalist (one of three UUs in Congress). Nulls preserved where his record is silent (no public position located).
profile.religion: Unitarian Universalist (one of three UUs in Congress per Pew religion-of-Congress survey)
profile.background: U.S. Representative CA-06 (Sacramento County suburbs — Elk Grove, Folsom, Rancho Cordova) since Jan 2013 (previously CA-07 2013-2023, redistricted). Physician (UC Irvine MD); former Sacramento County chief medical officer; clinical professor UC Davis School of Medicine. Senior member House Foreign Affairs (former Chair Indo-Pacific Subcommittee). Member New Democrat Coalition. Father Babulal Bera pleaded guilty 2017 to felony FEC violations for funneling money into Ami's campaigns (contextual integrity note, not directly on Ami's own record).

ami-bera.notes_set: CA-06 D incumbent since 2013, physician, House Foreign Affairs senior member. [2026-06-04 federal evidence sweep] Textbook Sacramento-suburb Democrat with no heterodox-D catches: 0% Heritage Action 117th, 9% 119th; 100% Reproductive Freedom for All; PP Champions Award; YES on Respect for Marriage Act (HR8404); cosponsor Equality Act (HR5 117th); F NRA-PVF + 7% GOA; YES on H.R.7910 Protecting Our Kids Act (mag limits, AR raise-to-21); publicly opposed SAVE Act citizenship verification (substack op-ed); YES on April 2024 Ukraine/Israel/Indo-Pacific $95B supplemental; $269,170 from pro-Israel PACs (AIPAC/CAJD/JAC/JSTREET) per TrackAIPAC; physician pro-vaccine-mandate posture. NO cosponsorship of Lee/Kaine AUMF repeal. Many cells NULL — no public position located on christian_liberty q3/q4, economic_stewardship q0/q1/q3/q4, election_integrity q0/q4, border_immigration q2/q4, self_defense q3, foreign_policy_restraint q0, industry_capture q1-q4. Per RESOLUTE methodology, do NOT infer from party — nulled where no evidence found.

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing archetype_party_default. Scored from congress.gov roll calls + clerk.house.gov vote records + NRLC 0% lifetime + Reproductive Freedom for All + HRC 100% + TrackAIPAC labels her 'AIPAC-backed' (her June 2026 progressive challenger Mai Vang attacking her on AIPAC + ICE-contractor donations). HETERODOX-D CATCH: voted YES on Iran War Powers Resolution June 2026 ('I have voted yes on every war powers resolution brought forward'). Otherwise textbook Sacramento coastal-D: 0% Heritage Action 117th + 7% lifetime, voted NO on SAVE Act + Laken Riley + CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act (HR5403). Cosponsor of Transgender Bill of Rights (H.Res.1058). Faces 2026 primary challenge from Vang. Methodist per Wikipedia categories. Age 81, 21-year incumbent since March 2005 special election (succeeded late husband Bob Matsui).
profile.religion: Methodist (per Wikipedia categories 'American Methodists,' 'Methodists from California,' 'Protestants from California')
profile.background: U.S. Representative CA-07 (Sacramento city) since March 2005 (won special election succeeding late husband Rep. Bob Matsui). Japanese-American internee at Poston, Arizona during WWII. UC Berkeley alum; Clinton White House Office of Public Liaison veteran. House Energy & Commerce member; Ranking Member Communications & Technology Subcommittee; co-chair Congressional High-Tech Caucus.

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing archetype_party_default. **HETERODOX-D STANDOUT on foreign policy + military-industrial complex.** Confirmed $0 AIPAC by his own statement on X (June 2026: 'I've taken $0 from AIPAC'); introduced his OWN Iran War Powers Resolution to stop Trump's strikes; voted AGAINST offensive-weapons funding for Israel; cosponsored Ceasefire Compliance Act; lead House Dem on bipartisan Pentagon-waste reform (Nunn-McCurdy Reform Act with Gimenez R; Streamline Pentagon Budgeting Act with Jayapal D + McClintock R; Stop Price Gouging the Military Act with Sen. Warren); cosponsored letter to DoD demanding antitrust scrutiny of defense-industry mergers. Sweeps foreign_policy_restraint q0/q1/q2/q3 TRUE + industry_capture q2/q4 TRUE — unusually heterodox profile. Otherwise standard CA-D on social/economic (RFMA YES; LCV-friendly; assault-weapons-ban author since 1989; pro-DACA). Religion listed only as generic 'Christian' in Pew 113th Congress survey — no specific denomination publicly confirmed. Basque heritage; UC Berkeley + Harvard MBA; Peace Corps veteran; Angus cattle rancher (Touch the Earth Ranch, Calaveras County) + pear farmer (Walnut Grove).
profile.religion: Christian (per Pew Research 113th Congress religion survey — no specific denomination publicly identified)
profile.background: U.S. Representative CA-08 (Solano County + parts of Sacramento and Contra Costa) since Nov 2009 (previously CA-10, then CA-03, now CA-08 since 2023). Senior member House Armed Services Committee; Ranking Member Readiness Subcommittee. Former CA Lieutenant Governor (2007-2009); former CA Insurance Commissioner (1991-1995, 2007-2009). UC Berkeley BA + Harvard MBA; Peace Corps veteran (Ethiopia). Cattle rancher (Touch the Earth Ranch, Calaveras County) + pear/specialty-crop farmer (Walnut Grove); Basque heritage.

john-garamendi.notes_set: CA-08 D incumbent since 2009 (former CA LG + Insurance Commissioner); HASC senior member. [2026-06-04 federal evidence sweep] **HETERODOX-D STANDOUT** on foreign policy + Pentagon waste: HARD TRUE on foreign_policy_restraint q0 (introduced his OWN Iran War Powers Resolution); q1 (proposed 90%-Afghanistan-withdrawal amendment 2013; voted against indefinite detention); q2 (voted against offensive-weapons funding for Israel; cosponsored Ceasefire Compliance Act); q3 ('I've taken $0 from AIPAC' — own statement, X June 2026 — first verified $0-AIPAC catch in this CA-Federal sweep). Industry_capture q4 HARD TRUE (lead House Dem on bipartisan Pentagon-waste reform: Nunn-McCurdy Reform Act with Gimenez R; Streamline Pentagon Budgeting Act with Jayapal D + McClintock R; Stop Price Gouging the Military Act with Sen Warren). Q2 HARD TRUE (cosponsored letter to DoD demanding antitrust scrutiny of defense-industry mergers — analogous to ag-antitrust posture). Otherwise standard CA-D: YES on Respect for Marriage Act; CA assault-weapons-ban author since 1989; pro-DACA / pathway; HR1 supporter; called for Constitutional-option debt-ceiling bypass. Rancher background didn't translate to specific raw-milk / anti-USDA position. Per RESOLUTE methodology, do NOT infer from party — nulled where no evidence found. Religion: only 'Christian' in Pew survey, no denomination identified.

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing archetype_party_default. Frontline Dem in formerly Trump-leaning San Joaquin Valley district; Stanford BA / Harvard MBA-MPP venture capitalist turned moderate Dem; first Dem on House Ag from Central Valley in ~50 years; member New Democrat Coalition + Problem Solvers Caucus. HETERODOX-D CATCHES (border + restraint): YES on Laken Riley Act (Jan 22 2025, one of only 46 House D crossovers — HARD TRUE on border_immigration q1+q2); YES on 2026 Iran War Powers Resolution; cosponsored H.Con.Res. 83 in 2020 directing termination of hostilities in/against Iran. Otherwise standard CA-D: 100% Reproductive Freedom for All; PP-endorsed; RFMA YES; Equality Caucus aligned; Giffords-endorsed; voted with Dems against Parents Bill of Rights H.R.5 (Mar 2023); AIPAC $234K+ per TrackAIPAC (FALSE on q3); voted YES on $17.6B Israel Security Supplemental Feb 2024 + UNRWA cuts + Antisemitism Awareness Act. Five-generation Manteca farming family roots; opposes Newsom's Delta Conveyance / Delta Tunnels (small-farm protectionism). NO publicly documented religion/denomination found — married 2018 at a botanical garden (not church wedding).
profile.background: U.S. Representative CA-09 (Stockton / San Joaquin Valley) since Jan 2023 (previously CA-10 2019-2023, redistricted). Stanford BA + Harvard MBA-MPP; venture capitalist (Bessemer Venture Partners); first Dem in CA-09 in modern era. Five-generation Manteca farming family roots (great-great-grandfather started a peach farm). First Central Valley Democrat on House Ag Committee in nearly 50 years. Member New Democrat Coalition + Problem Solvers Caucus.

josh-harder.notes_set: CA-09 D incumbent since 2019 (Stockton/San Joaquin Valley swing district); New Dem + Problem Solvers + House Ag. [2026-06-04 federal evidence sweep] HETERODOX-D CATCHES: HARD TRUE on border_immigration q1+q2 (voted YES on Laken Riley Act Jan 22 2025 — only 46 D crossovers — mandatory detention of illegal aliens charged with theft/violent crime; implicitly supports federal preemption over sanctuary protections); HARD TRUE on foreign_policy_restraint q0+q1 (voted YES on 2026 Iran War Powers Resolution; cosponsored H.Con.Res. 83 in 2020 directing termination of Iran hostilities under War Powers Act). FALSE elsewhere on the orthodox-D pattern: WHPA YES; PP-endorsed; RFMA YES; Equality Caucus aligned; H.R. 5 Parents Bill of Rights NO (Mar 2023); Giffords-endorsed + Bipartisan Background Checks supporter; AIPAC $234K+ per TrackAIPAC; YES on $17.6B Israel Security Supplemental + UNRWA cuts + Antisemitism Awareness Act; YES on Ensuring Access to Abortion Act; voted NO on H.R. 2 Secure the Border Act (May 2023); voted NO on SAVE Act (April 2025 — was NOT in the 4 D crossovers). Delta Tunnels opposition (Central Valley small-farm protectionism). No public position located on religion/denomination, christian_liberty, economic_stewardship most cells, election_integrity q0/q4, border_immigration q2/q3/q4, self_defense q3, foreign_policy_restraint q4, industry_capture q0/q1/q2/q4. Per RESOLUTE methodology, do NOT infer from party — nulled where no evidence found.
